connect.title: Connect

labels.disconnectFirst: Connected — disconnect first to switch nodes

connect.modeTooltip: Browser: proxy only browser and apps honoring the system proxy. Full VPN: route all system traffic through an encrypted tunnel (recommended).

empty.title: No nodes available
empty.subtitle: Please purchase a plan or refresh your subscription
empty.noSubscription: You don't have a subscription yet

trial.claimPrompt: Please claim this month's Trial traffic in the dashboard
trial.emptyTitle: Trial traffic is ready to claim
trial.emptySubtitle: Your Trial currently has no usable traffic. Claim this month's Trial traffic in the dashboard, then rebuild the subscription.

connect.startupSyncFailed: Subscription sync failed. Click to retry.

promoCode.title: Promo Code
promoCode.heading: Redeem traffic promo code
promoCode.subtitle: Enter a promo code issued by the dashboard. After redemption, XXLink will refresh your subscription and sync nodes.
promoCode.syncWarning: The promo code was redeemed, but subscription sync failed. Retry sync, or open Connect and rebuild the subscription.

chips.trafficCode: For traffic codes issued by admin

announcement.label: XXLink Announcement
announcement.dismissHint: After closing, this announcement will not appear again. You will be notified when a new announcement is published.
